creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: yuri
Date: Tue Mar 20 03:39:58 UTC 2018
New revision: 465062
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/465062

Log:
  New port: sysutils/tmux23: The older version 2.3 of sysutils/tmux

  Miroslav Lachman reported that the version 2.3 is free
  of buggy behavior with mouse scrolling etc. that was
  introduced in later versions.

  While in sysutils/Makefile, also fixed a minor ordering
  problem.

  PR:		223685
  Submitted by:	Miroslav Lachman <000.fbsd@quip.cz>

Changes:
  head/sysutils/Makefile
  head/sysutils/tmux/Makefile
  head/sysutils/tmux23/
  head/sysutils/tmux23/Makefile
  head/sysutils/tmux23/pkg-descr
